title: Create Cool 4
description: A fun Create centered modpack with a bit of mekanism.
body:
A Create centered modpack with some endgame Mekanism and Applied Energistics 2. If you enjoy automation and factory building, this is the modpack for you! The modpack also features some exploration elements such as Tectonic and Geophilic for awesome and stunning terrain, while also not going too far from the vanilla generation.

<details>
<summary>Mods feature details add summaries</summary>
  
## Create + Addons
Adds mechanical contraptions, realistic trains and automation with rotational power. Also contains some addons which adds basic jetpacks, decoration and even more automation recipes.

## Mekanism
More compact and advanced machines intended for the lategame, also featuring some overpowered armor and tools.

## Applied Energistics 2
Better storage management with a digital interface to see all of your items all at once. Also features some automation features which can quickly craft and transport items.

## Computer Craft
A computer mod which can control your factories with programs created in the Lua programming language, which requires some programming knowlage. Though you can sometimes download open programs that others have made.

## Farmer's Delight + Addons
More crops and farming! Much of which can be automated with create.
</details>

This modpack is mostly for my friends but feel free to download it. Though if you have any suggestions i will not take them.
